description.value:
Starting at 3rd level, you've trained to perform powerful strikes in combat and to supplement your fighting style with your attire to manipulate both the weight of armor and the flexibility of slimmer clothing to your benefit. While you are wearing armor, you can treat the armor as being one type lower for the purposes of jutsu, features, feats, and traits outside of this clan. (Light ↔ Medium ↔ Heavy) Also, you can don or doff light armor as a Bonus Action, medium armor as an Action, and heavy armor as a Full Turn Action, granting the following benefits depending on whether you are wearing armor or not.

While you are wearing armor, you gain the following benefits:

  • Up to half of any damage reduction granted by your armor applies to all damage instead of specific damage types.

  • You gain a +1d4 bonus to Martial Arts checks, and once per round, you can make a Martial Arts check at advantage.

  • Your passive Martial Arts increases by +5, and once per round when you would hit a creature with an unarmed or Taijutsu attack or when they would fail a saving throw against a Taijutsu or Bukijutsu, you can forcefully move them a number of feet equal to 5 × your base Strength or Charisma Ability Modifier in a direction you choose.

  • At 7th level, if your passive Martial Arts exceeds a creature's passive Insight, they cannot gain the benefits of the Read the Enemy skill action or any other similar effect that would provide information on actions you take.

  • At 11th level, you cannot automatically fail Strength or Charisma checks or saving throws, instead rolling at disadvantage and being unable to gain bonuses to them.

While you are unarmored, you gain the following benefits:

  • You can Dash or Disengage as a Bonus Action. If you would gain or already possess a feature that would allow either of these, you can instead perform both as part of the same action.

  • You gain a bonus to Strength or Charisma checks you make equal to half your base Strength or Charisma Ability Modifier, respectively, decided when you doff your armor.

  • You can make checks involving jutsu with a range of Self at advantage and can make concentration checks involving them using Strength or Charisma in place of any other relevant Ability Modifier.

  • At 7th level, being Weakened only reduces damage you deal by half the condition's listed value, and when you cast a jutsu with a range of Self, you can reduce the cost or concentration cost by half, twice per rest.

  • At 11th level, you gain advantage on saving throws to resist the Weakened condition, and if you would start your turn suffering from a rank-based Physical condition while gaining the benefits of a jutsu with a range of Self, you lose 1 rank of one such condition of your choice.
